guides.title: Guides
guides.metaDesc: All Kingshot guides in one place: Events, PVE, PVP, Equipment, and more.

tips.title: Tips
tips.li2: F2P players should prioritize joining the rallies of top alliance members

overview.title: Event Overview
overview.body: Bear Hunt is an alliance event available every 48 hours where you can earn Crafting Hammers.

heroes.title: Hero Composition
heroes.li1: Rally Leader: Always assign your strongest rally hero
heroes.li2: Rally Members: Prioritize heroes whose first expedition skill gives Attack or Siege buffs

mode.title: Solo vs Rally Participation
mode.li1: Always run 1 rally of your own
mode.li2: Join 6 rallies of stronger alliance members
mode.li3: Operating 7 marches total is the key to high Bear Hunt scores

meta.title: Kingshot Beginner’s Guide | KingshotData EN
meta.desc: A practical guide for F2P/low-spender players to grow efficiently from the early to 2nd generation phase. Learn the step-by-step loop of Town Center, Arena, Heroes, and Gear without unnecessary spending.
meta.author: KingshotData Community Guide

beginner.intro: This guide summarizes the key principles and practical tips for F2P/low-spender players to grow efficiently during the early–2nd generation phase. It provides step-by-step guidance to build a sustainable loop of Town Center, Arena, Heroes, and Gear without overspending.

toc.title: Table of Contents
toc.s10: Diamond Usage: Up to VIP4 → Roulette

s1.title: 1) Unlock Construction/Queue Slots
s1.p1: Extra construction slots are a must. Queue slots drastically improve gathering, hunting, and marching efficiency. In both diamonds and cash spending order, construction/queue unlocks are top priority.

s2.title: 2) Move to a Top (Rank 1–3) Alliance
s2.p1: Top alliances dominate in daily chests/gifts, quick HELP, stronger shrine/ruin buffs, and frequent rallies. They also provide safety during gathering and reduced damage during ALL OUT phases.
s2.l1: Daily rewards: 4–5 alliance chests, steady speedups/diamonds.
s2.l2: Shrine/ruin buffs (e.g., construction speed) boost overall growth.
s2.l3: Avoid political conflicts: join at least Rank 2–3.

s3.title: 3) Arena Ranking → Legendary Gear Loop
s3.p1: For low spenders, the most realistic way to obtain legendary gear consistently is through Arena. Save coins and shards to get one piece every ~2 weeks, focusing on your main troop type first.
s3.l1: Initially matched within a single server → later merged. Gaps widen mainly by gear count and mastery.
s3.l2: If your main comp is cavalry/archers, prioritize offensive gear first.
s3.l3: Rally participation alone gives limited gear benefits → prioritize Arena.

s4.title: 4) Heroes & Gear Should Focus on Arena
s4.p1: In Castle battles, contribution comes from troop tier/quantity. In Arena, stars and gear directly decide results. After 2nd generation, Hero Growth events merge into larger events—focus mainly on strengthening Arena power.

s5.title: 5) Universal Legendary Shards First
s5.p1: You can spin the roulette with diamonds, but heroes from the Hall require universal shards for star upgrades. Save shards for next-gen key heroes (e.g., Marine) instead of early-game heroes.
s5.tip: Tip: Heroes like Jaibel can be farmed from Hall/Outlook Tower, so save universal shards for next-gen SSR heroes.

s6.title: 6) Resources from Gathering + Keep in Bag
s6.p1: Unless you overspend speedups, gathering alone can cover most needs. To avoid being looted, store resources as bag items and only use them when required.

s7.title: 7) Prioritize Town Center Upgrade
s7.p1: Troop tier gaps define overall power. Rush Town Center to unlock higher tiers as soon as possible.

s8.title: 8) Strongest Governor vs Short-Term Events
s8.p1: It’s hard to beat whales in Strongest Governor. Instead, target 1st place in 1–2 day events to secure ~50,000 diamonds regularly.

overnight.l1: Start construction at event start → HELP → speedup 24h later.
overnight.l2: Finish with speedups 1 min before event ends to secure ranking.
overnight.l3: When combined with Alliance Mobilization, you score double.

tech.p1: Use research speedups to push for 1st place. Usually follows overnight construction.

union.p1: Reroll tasks to get high-value ones (e.g., 200% speedup). Use troops, hunts, and gathering to secure 700+ pts/day.

hero.p1: Save shards from Tower/events and apply them right before event ends.

beast.p1: Use Diana’s stamina reduction nodes. Compete right after Cesare to maximize leftover meat.

s9.title: 9) Principles for Cash Purchases
s9.l1: Early: Construction/Queue unlock, Monthly Card (on discount).
s9.l2: Mid/late: Packages with high universal shard value.
s9.l3: Buy speedup packs only if paired with event bursts.
s9.warn: Warning: Buying diamonds directly is less efficient long-term than winning event rewards.

s10.title: 10) Diamonds: Up to VIP4 → Roulette
s10.l1: Invest up to VIP4 (construction +10%). Efficiency drops after.
s10.l2: Save for 120x roulette cycles. Secure key SSRs per generation.
s10.l3: Maintain diamond income from alliance, arena, bank, and events.

s11.title: 11) Shop Purchase Priorities
s11.l1: Wandering Trader: resources↔resources, speedups, advanced teleport (avoid diamond purchases).
s11.l2: Mystery Shop: hero parts. Grab 50% discounts and free rerolls.
s11.l3: Arena Shop: prioritize legendary gear chests.
s11.l4: Alliance Shop: VIP, 70% construction speedups, shields/teleports (prefer ≥40% discounts).

s12.title: 12) Arena Basics
s12.l1: Practical goal: Top 100–500. Daily rewards = diamonds + coins.
s12.l2: Attack weaker opponents for win rate. Defense = tank/stun setups.
s12.l3: Don’t buy extra attempts with diamonds—better to strengthen heroes/gear.

s13.title: 13) Troop Training & Promotion
s13.p1: Aim to field mostly T8+ troops early. Instead of disbanding, promote lower tiers. After TC22, mass-produce higher tiers.

s14.title: 14) Hero System & Rallies
s14.l1: Grades: R (gathering), SR (entry-level combat), SSR (optimized combat: roulette/hall/governor).
s14.l2: Skills: Left side = Arena/hunting, Right side = defense/siege/hunt.
s14.l3: Rally: Leader’s buffs (governor, hero, gear) apply to all. Members only share their 1st slot’s top 4 skills (estimated). Low spenders contribute with SR 4★ heroes + high-tier troops.

s15.title: 15) Academy Investment Order
s15.l1: Early: Development → Economy → Combat. Focus training speed, hospital, bandages.
s15.l2: Later: Increase combat investment (for solo fights).
s15.l3: Equipment upgrades can be skipped if efficiency drops.

s16.title: 16) Field Hospitals & Loss Management
s16.p1: Losses occur if hospital capacity is exceeded. Minimize by limiting low-tier use, expanding hospital space, and avoiding big power-gap fights.

s17.title: 17) Conscription & Loyalty
s17.p1: Overflow wounded go to conscription camp. Loyalty recovers over time, dailies, and gathering. Cash recovery is inefficient.

s18.title: 18) Law Buff Timing
s18.p1: Activating a construction law reduces build time by 20% if started within 5 minutes. Best used with long builds right before event deadlines.

s19.title: 19) City Buff Usage
s19.l1: Shields/anti-scout: essential during unstable politics or wars.
s19.l2: Random teleport: useful for new gathering/raiding spots.
s19.l3: Training/gathering buffs: use selectively for long cycles.

s20.title: 20) Alliance System Essentials
s20.l1: Territory bonus: stay inside alliance tiles for buffs.
s20.l3: Alliance shop/science/HELP: source of speedups, shields, VIP, and reduced timers.
s20.l4: War/Logs: track rallies, solo fights, and battle history.

faq.title: FAQ Summary
faq.q1: Q. What should low spenders buy first? — A. Construction/queue unlock, monthly card (discounted), universal shard packs.
faq.q2: Q. Where to spend diamonds? — A. Up to VIP4, then roulette. Win 1st place in short events for bulk diamonds.
faq.q3: Q. Growth loop? — A. Town Center → Arena Ranking → Gear Farming → Arena Power.

footer.note: This guide is based on real gameplay and community tips. Optimal strategies may vary depending on server and meta conditions.
